name: AA Eastern Mobility Inc
recent_news: Active small family-owned mobility equipment sales and service business in Woodsboro/Keymar, MD; no school-bus or contracted student-transport activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Company is a mobility equipment dealer/installer (wheelchair lifts, ramps, van conversions), not a school-bus or contracted student-transportation operator. Out of scope for Summit.

name: Arrive In Style Limo Svc
recent_news: Micro limousine/car service operating from PO Box in West Ossipee, NH; no school-bus contracts, special-needs routing, or web presence identified.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Appears to be a one-vehicle limousine/car service rather than a school-bus or SPED contractor. Too small and wrong vertical for Summit.

name: Easy Med Co Ransportion
recent_news: Yellow Pages listing marks the 1592 N Beale Rd, Marysville CA location as CLOSED; appears to be a defunct micro NEMT operator (note: name unrelated to easymedtransport.com, a separate active NEMT business).
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Listing indicates the business is closed and was a non-emergency medical transport micro-operator, not a school-bus contractor.

name: Hood Transportation LLC
recent_news: Small special-needs/disability transportation provider at 2360 Citygate Dr, Columbus OH; listed on Yelp and area special-needs directories but no website, fleet, or contract details surfaced.
fit_notes: Not a meaningful tuck-in. Micro-operator (4 employees, ~$253K) focused on disability/special-needs rides rather than yellow-bus or contracted student-transportation routes. Below Summit's tuck-in size threshold.

name: Rose Wheelchair Trnsprtn LLC
recent_news: No online presence located; appears to be a micro wheelchair/NEMT operator out of Canal Winchester, OH managed by Brenda Henry. Multiple other Canal Winchester NEMT/wheelchair providers dominate search results.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Wheelchair/NEMT micro-operator rather than a contracted school-bus or SPED provider; sub-scale for Summit and outside core school-transport vertical.
